patch.value: Add pm brief since delta command for agent re-orientation after parallel/merge work

An agent resuming a project (especially after other agents worked in parallel branches and merged) needs a precise, token-budgeted summary of WHAT CHANGED since its checkpoint instead of re-reading the whole project. Adds a new 'pm brief since <checkpoint>' subcommand that classifies activity since a checkpoint into created / closed / status-transitions (incl. newly blocked, newly unblocked, started) / reprioritized / dependency-edge changes / notes+comments, grouped per item and joined with current item state. Directly serves the ecosystem philosophy 'project management = context management' and the multi-agent merge workflow.

pm brief since <checkpoint> summarizes changes since a checkpoint timestamp or relative window: created, closed, status transitions (newly blocked/unblocked/started), reprioritizations, dependency/edge changes, and new notes/comments; grouped per item with current title/type/status; supports --to, --author filter, --format text|json|markdown|slack, token budget, and deterministic ordering; sources from pm activity --full --json --from/--to joined with current item state; tests + README cover behavior; npm run release:check passes.
